raw_text: it's is too good but they don't keep the change if you order of rupees 441 and give them a note of 500 they says mam please give change they don't keep change this is the problem But the service is good and delivery man's behaviour is also good 👍

It is a useful app but it takes a 30 rupees delivery charge item you brought from the market is 50 rupees and in this the product value is the same here but it makes the product 100 rupees by delivery charge etc I request to blinkit please low the price THANKYOU
I really like Blinkit's services. It not only helps in day to day groceries but also some electronic or other daily use stuff. The best part is, I have used it across India.

it really feels good having blinkit in ropar city it makes things available in minutes like earlier I used to order diapers for my baby girl from firstcry and it takes more or less than 1 week . Thanks to blinkit
its over all a good app, but unavailability should be taken care, if the service is unavailable then it's unavailable for 2 hours or 3 hours , so it basically can't be used during emergency
overall is quick and availability of product variety is good but instead of arrived ....should be updated as delivered after delivery of items.

their customer support desk sucks..The chatbot keeps repeating the same message and unable to address issues and doesn't even connect to live agent despite multiple highlights...Such a message! pathetic service
Amazing service, my order was delivered quickly and all the items well packed. Blinkit makes grocery shopping fast, convenient and hassle free
Very bad support and sends old products without a seal further support says they did the verification so can't help. Just a fraud to customer.
worst support system and once placed an order wrongly then it can't be cancel. Blinkit should upgrade the app support system....otherwise the customer will not use the app further...

The pressed bone I ordered for my dog — within a few seconds, some strange thing came out of it. After taking that thing in my hand, it looked completely hollow from inside and had no weight. The product is not right. I have ordered this before as well, but I never had an experience like this. After this I chatted with Blinkit to get my problem resolved, but they closed the chat right after knowing my problem. What should I do now? If anything happens to my dog's health because of this product,

Blinkit's service is fast, and the support team responds quickly. However, I had a very bad experience with a delivery partner who used abusive language during a phone call. What disappointed me even more was that Blinkit asked me to treat it as a "one-time exception" instead of taking strict action. Customers pay for good service, not disrespect. I hope Blinkit takes such behavior seriously and protects the dignity of its customers.
There is no dedicated phone line to connect with customer care. No live agent to connect in the help section. The E-mail team refused to provide any kind of help.
For the past two months, my ₹760 has been stuck in the Blinkit app. I haven't received any help from Blinkit's customer support. The service is extremely poor and very disappointing.

It might be paid reviews because this platform is not even worth 1 star. They have replaced each and every support executive with AI chatbots and even the ones which are human converse like chatbots anyway. If you ever encounter an issue forget getting any resolution because according to them, all issues are strictly classified into 3 categories. Good luck explaining your concern to a chatbot when the concern is different from the 3 given categories. Cashbacks here are always a dark practice.
I once complained about a damaged product and I can't place order after that. Really disappointed by this. I used to love blinkit but not anymore..
it was good, I had no problem in receiving the package and the delivery guy was not rude at all. it was a good experience, the package arrived best and clean, no damage thanks blinkit!
I ordered 3-4 items in ONE order. and I received 4 orders. but the system only show 3. but I had physically 4 orders due to which only one order could be canceled

worst app I have seen for instant delivery products not even not even accepting any payment method so I have added some money to wallet even after that order is not accepting and saying try another payment method and worst customer support
